audit_trigger.subject: fix(date): local-time + TZ display across dashboards (was showing UTC, caused 2026-05-22 at 10pm EDT)

cadence.policy: Per-commit (any commit re-runs the audit via husky post-commit hook) + per-cron-cycle (5-min watcher fires regen-all + this aggregator). For PARBAUGHS app commits specifically, the is_app_commit flag is set so the dashboard distinguishes app-code-driven refreshes from substrate-driven ones.
cadence.next_scheduled: on next commit, OR within 5 minutes via cron
cadence.founder_cadence_request: Audit should refresh after each app commit + after each wave close — wired 2026-05-21 per Founder request.

honest_disclosures: A8 (Performance) + A9 (Accessibility) deferred to Phase 2: tooling not yet wired (Lighthouse + axe-core).
A4 (UI/UX) score derived from prior 2026-05-14 audit summary, not live Lighthouse.
A11 (Testing) score is a spec-LOC-vs-app-LOC proxy until unit-coverage tooling is added.
A5 (Code quality) is file-size budget compliance only — not cyclomatic, dead-code, or duplication.
